invariant: The prepare_meeting prompt-input gate uses the DOS-218 bundle-1 target and adjacent account pattern so source_ref-matched claims about Account B never enter Account A prompt evidence.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = src-b13-adjacent is absent from canonical prepare_meeting PromptContext.evidence even though its source_ref is the meeting id. FAIL = src-b13-adjacent crosses the provider boundary.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds meetings, attendees, linked subjects, and intelligence_claims rows consumed by the public prepare_meeting context builder.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Only Target Example content is allowed in rendered MeetingBrief sections.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Records the allowed target subject and the blocked adjacent subject that must be filtered before provider input.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pinned to the live prepare_meeting Transform canonical replay key after adjacent source_ref evidence is filtered from prompt input.
